headline: Dmitry Shubov Remarks on Southeast Asian Legal-Tech Founders Facing New U.S. Market Barriers as Gartner Predicts 35% of Countries Will Move to Region-Specific AI Platforms by 2027
summary: FREMONT, Calif., March 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As some governments and large buyers move towards locking AI workloads into region-specific platforms, Southeast Asian legal-tech founders face a new crossroads when planning U.S. pilots, sales, and fundraising. Gartner predicted that platform lock-in‚ such as sovereign cloud and country-region artificial intelligence (AI) platforms‚ is expected to grow from 5% to 35% by 2027․ This could create compliance and commercial risks for Southeast Asia
